en.name: QazSound
en.cardTagline: Uploads, YouTube audio, favorites, and a custom player.
en.cardDescription: I built QazSound as a one-month Django project to practice a more complete product flow: publishing tracks, handling media, working with likes, and keeping the frontend interactive without relying on a big framework.
en.headline: A Django music platform for uploading tracks, importing YouTube audio safely, and keeping a personal favorites library.
en.summary: QazSound combines uploaded tracks and YouTube-based audio in one web app. I used it to practice backend validation, custom frontend interactions, admin tooling, and deploy-ready Django configuration in a project that felt more complete than a basic tutorial build.
en.challenge: I wanted something bigger than a static student project. The goal was to build a working product with content publishing, interaction logic, admin tooling, and deployment preparation in one place.
en.solution: I built it as a modular Django app with separate apps for tracks, users, and interactions, plus a global player, AJAX likes, YouTube metadata preview, and a custom admin dashboard.
en.impact: QazSound helped me practice Django architecture, media handling, frontend state, and deployment setup inside one real project.
goals: Turn classroom ideas into a more production-like implementation.
Practice Django architecture beyond basic tutorials.
Work on both backend validation and frontend interaction patterns.
Learn deployment preparation with static files, environment config, and database switching.
features: Track publishing with upload or YouTube source.
Favorites and likes with AJAX updates.
A global audio player with saved playback state.
Search, filtering, profile settings, and avatar management.
A custom Django admin dashboard with analytics.
future: More test coverage and CI/CD automation.

kz.name: QazSound
kz.cardTagline: Upload, YouTube audio, favorites және custom player.
kz.cardDescription: QazSound-ты бір айлық Django жобасы ретінде жасадым. Негізгі мақсат - қарапайым static project емес, track publishing, media handling, likes және интерактивті frontend бар толықтау flow құру болды.
kz.headline: Track upload жасауға, YouTube audio-ны қауіпсіз қолдануға және favorites кітапханасын ұстауға арналған Django music platform.
kz.summary: QazSound upload жасалған тректер мен YouTube-негізді audio-ны бір web app-ке біріктіреді. Осы жоба арқылы backend validation, custom frontend interaction, admin tooling және deploy-ready Django configuration-ды практикада жасап көрдім.
kz.challenge: Маған жай static student project-тен үлкенірек нәрсе керек болды. Бір жерде content publishing, interaction logic, admin tooling және deployment preparation бар жұмыс істейтін жоба жасағым келді.
kz.solution: Сондықтан оны tracks, users және interactions деп бөлінген Django app-терімен, global player, AJAX likes, YouTube metadata preview және custom admin dashboard-пен құрдым.
kz.impact: QazSound маған Django architecture, media handling, frontend state және deployment setup-ты бір жобаның ішінде практикада көруге көмектесті.
goals: Django architecture-ны basic tutorial деңгейінен тереңірек практикада көру.
Backend validation мен frontend interaction pattern-дерін қатар жасау.
Static files, environment config және database switching арқылы deployment preparation үйрену.
features: Upload немесе YouTube source арқылы track publishing.
Playback state сақтайтын global audio player.
Search, filtering, profile settings және avatar management.
Analytics бар custom Django admin dashboard.
future: Көбірек test coverage және CI/CD automation.

ru.name: QazSound
ru.cardTagline: Uploads, YouTube audio, favorites и custom player.
ru.cardDescription: Я собрал QazSound как месячный Django-проект, чтобы потренировать более цельный product flow: публикацию треков, media handling, likes и интерактивный frontend без большого framework.
ru.headline: Django music platform для загрузки треков, безопасной работы с YouTube audio и личной favorites library.
ru.summary: QazSound объединяет uploaded tracks и YouTube-based audio в одном web app. Через этот проект я практиковал backend validation, custom frontend interactions, admin tooling и deploy-ready Django configuration в более цельном формате, чем обычный tutorial build.
ru.challenge: Мне хотелось сделать что-то большее, чем просто static student project. Цель была в том, чтобы в одном месте собрать content publishing, interaction logic, admin tooling и deployment preparation.
ru.solution: Поэтому я сделал его как modular Django app с отдельными apps для tracks, users и interactions, а также с global player, AJAX likes, YouTube metadata preview и custom admin dashboard.
ru.impact: QazSound помог мне на практике пройти через Django architecture, media handling, frontend state и deployment setup внутри одного проекта.
goals: Перевести учебные идеи в более production-like implementation.
Попрактиковать Django architecture глубже, чем в basic tutorials.
Поработать одновременно с backend validation и frontend interaction patterns.
Понять deployment preparation через static files, env config и database switching.
features: Track publishing через upload или YouTube source.
Favorites и likes с AJAX updates.
Global audio player с сохранением playback state.
Search, filtering, profile settings и avatar management.
Custom Django admin dashboard с аналитикой.
future: Больше test coverage и CI/CD automation.
